messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-524 — Gherkin lint gate: fail loudly when the vendored parser silently drops a multi-Examples Scenario Outline
What it solves: WHAT / WHY: a Scenario Outline with TWO OR MORE `Examples:` blocks is silently mangled by
the vendored APS gherkin-parser — it returns `"examples": []` (ALL tables dropped) while
still reporting a clean parse (exit 0), and swarmforge/scripts/gherkin_lint_gate.sh reports
"parses cleanly". This is th…
Approval context: A swarm-surfaced tooling bug the HARDENER hit while hardening BL-515: a Scenario Outline with two or more `Examples:` blocks is silently reduced to an EMPTY examples list by the vendored (pinned, off-limits) APS parser, yet our lint gate still says "parses cleanly" — so the Outline's rows never dri…
BL-524 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-524" (or "reject BL-524 <reason>") to act.
